- 将后 `k / 2` 个元素设为 `1`（卖出）。

**输入：** prices = [4,2,8], strategy = [-1,0,1], k = 2

**输出：** 10

**解释：**

| 修改        | 策略       | 利润计算                                  | 利润 |
| ----------- | ---------- | ----------------------------------------- | ---- |
| 原始        | [-1, 0, 1] | (-1 × 4) + (0 × 2) + (1 × 8) = -4 + 0 + 8 | 4    |

| ----------- | --------- | --------------------------------------- | ---- |

| 修改 [0, 1] | [0, 1, 0] | (0 × 5) + (1 × 4) + (0 × 3) = 0 + 4 + 0 | 4    |
| 修改 [1, 2] | [1, 0, 1] | (1 × 5) + (0 × 4) + (1 × 3) = 5 + 0 + 3 | 8    |

long long solve(vector<long long> prices, vector<long long> strategy, long long k) {

    int n = prices.size();

    long long original_profit = 0;

    for (int i=0; i < n; ++i) {

        original_profit += strategy[i] * prices[i];

    }

    int m = k / 2;

    vector<long long> prefixA(n + 1, 0);

    for (int i=0; i < n; ++i) {

        prefixA[i+1] = prefixA[i] + (-strategy[i] * prices[i]);

    }

    vector<long long> prefixB(n + 1, 0);

    for (int i=0; i < n; ++i) {

        prefixB[i+1] = prefixB[i] + ((1 - strategy[i]) * prices[i]);

    }

    long long max_delta = -1e18; // or something very small

    for (int i=0; i <= n - k; ++i) {

        int start = i;

        int end = i + k - 1;

        // first part is from i to i + m -1

        int a_start = i;

        int a_end = i + m - 1;

        // sum_A is prefixA[i + m] - prefixA[i]

        long long sumA = prefixA[i + m] - prefixA[i];

        // second part is from i + m to i + k -1

        int b_start = i + m;

        int b_end = i + k -1;

        long long sumB = prefixB[b_end + 1] - prefixB[b_start];

        long long delta = sumA + sumB;

        if (delta > max_delta) {

            max_delta = delta;

        }

    }

    return original_profit + max( max_delta, 0 );

}
